message:
test(backup): add schedule parsing and next_after unit tests

Expand backup module test coverage:

- schedule_parses_keywords: Verify hourly, daily, weekly keyword parsing
- schedule_next_daily_advances: Test next_after returns future time
  with correct hour/minute for daily schedules
- schedule_parses_cron: Test cron expression parsing ("15 3 * * *")

Also includes minor formatting fixes from rustfmt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
